qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Offside, Korea Republic. Son Heung-Min is caught offside.
Lee Kang-In (Korea Republic) wins a free kick on the right wing.

events.description: 拉迪斯拉夫·克雷杰奇犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Korea Republic. Conceded by Jaroslav Zeleny.
Attempt blocked. Son Heung-Min (Korea Republic) left footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Lee Jae-Sung.

events.description: 孙兴慜射门被封堵。 李在成参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Korea Republic. Conceded by Robin Hranác.
Attempt missed. Lee Han-Beom (Korea Republic) header from the centre of the box is too high. Assisted by Lee Tae-Seok with a cross following a corner.

events.description: 李韩范射门偏出。 李太锡参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Lee Kang-In (Korea Republic) left footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom right corner by Matej Kovár (Czechia). Assisted by Kim Min-Jae.

events.description: 李强仁射正。 金玟哉参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Korea Republic. Conceded by Matej Kovár.
Attempt blocked. Son Heung-Min (Korea Republic) right footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Lee Kang-In.

events.description: 孙兴慜射门被封堵。 李强仁参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Czechia. Conceded by Kim Min-Jae.
Foul by Pavel Sulc (Czechia).
Offside, Czechia. Lukás Provod is caught offside.
Lukás Provod (Czechia) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Corner, Czechia. Conceded by Lee Tae-Seok.
Corner, Czechia. Conceded by Hwang In-Beom.
Attempt missed. Tomás Soucek (Czechia) left footed shot from very close range misses to the right. Assisted by Alexandr Sojka with a cross following a corner.

events.description: 托马斯·苏克射门偏出。 亚历山大·索伊卡参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Lukás Provod (Czechia).
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Offside, Korea Republic. Seol Young-Woo is caught offside.
Delay in match (Korea Republic).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Foul by Lee Han-Beom (Korea Republic).
Lee Gi-Hyuk (Korea Republic) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: 弗拉基米尔·库法尔犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Pavel Sulc (Czechia) right footed shot from outside the box is just a bit too high.

events.description: 帕维尔·苏尔克射门偏出。

qualifiers.espnText: Vladimír Coufal (Czechia) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Vladimír Coufal (Czechia).

events.description: 弗拉基米尔·库法尔犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Son Heung-Min (Korea Republic) right footed shot from outside the box is too high. Assisted by Lee Jae-Sung.

events.description: 孙兴慜射门偏出。 李在成参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Son Heung-Min (Korea Republic) left footed shot from outside the box misses to the left. Assisted by Kim Min-Jae.

events.description: 孙兴慜射门偏出。 金玟哉参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Vladimír Coufal (Czechia).

events.description: 弗拉基米尔·库法尔犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Lee Tae-Seok (Korea Republic) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: 弗拉基米尔·库法尔犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Lee Jae-Sung (Korea Republic).
Foul by Robin Hranác (Czechia).
Attempt blocked. Son Heung-Min (Korea Republic) right footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Lee Tae-Seok.

events.description: 孙兴慜射门被封堵。 李太锡参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Fourth official has announced 3 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时3分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Hwang In-Beom (Korea Republic) right footed shot from outside the box is high and wide to the left. Assisted by Son Heung-Min.

events.description: 黄仁范射门偏出。 孙兴慜参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half ends, Korea Republic 0, Czechia 0.
Second Half begins Korea Republic 0, Czechia 0.
Foul by Kim Min-Jae (Korea Republic).
Corner, Czechia. Conceded by Lee Han-Beom.
Attempt saved. Hwang In-Beom (Korea Republic) right footed shot from the right side of the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Matej Kovár (Czechia). Assisted by Lee Kang-In.

events.description: 黄仁范射正。 李强仁参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Lee Jae-Sung (Korea Republic) left footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Matej Kovár (Czechia).
Lee Jae-Sung (Korea Republic) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Attempt saved. Son Heung-Min (Korea Republic) left footed shot from the left side of the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Matej Kovár (Czechia). Assisted by Lee Jae-Sung.

events.description: 孙兴慜射正。 李在成参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Korea Republic. Conceded by Matej Kovár.

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Lee Jae-Sung (Korea Republic) header from the centre of the box misses to the left. Assisted by Seol Young-Woo with a cross.

events.description: 李在成射门偏出。 薛英佑参与进攻。
黄希灿 登场，李在成 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Jaroslav Zeleny (Czechia) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

Corner, Czechia. Conceded by Kim Seung-Gyu.
Foul by Tomás Chory (Czechia).

events.description: 金敬宇 登场，黄仁范 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Lee Han-Beom (Korea Republic).
Attempt saved. Michal Sadílek (Czechia) header from outside the box is saved in the bottom right corner by Kim Seung-Gyu (Korea Republic).
Lee Kang-In (Korea Republic) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
